task_completion.description: Navigate to the SuiteCRM Home dashboard
task_completion.visual_evidence: The SuiteCRM interface is visible with the 'Home' tab or dashboard active.

task_completion.description: Open the 'Add Dashlet' menu or dialog
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dialog, modal, or menu titled 'Add Dashlet' (or similar) is open on the screen.
The agent clicks on or selects the 'Projects' dashlet from the available options in the 'Add Dashlet' menu.
The agent clicks on or selects the 'Invoices' dashlet from the available options in the 'Add Dashlet' menu.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Projects' dashlet is on the Home dashboard
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dashlet titled 'Projects' or 'My Projects' is visible on the main Home dashboard view.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Invoices' dashlet is on the Home dashboard
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dashlet titled 'Invoices' or 'My Invoices' is visible on the main Home dashboard view.

integrity.description: Agent used the SuiteCRM web interface to add dashlets
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the SuiteCRM web UI, not terminal commands or database queries to modify user preferences.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual SuiteCRM application
integrity.visual_evidence: The SuiteCRM application is running in a standard web browser with realistic UI elements.

integrity.description: Dashlets appear to be genuine SuiteCRM components
integrity.visual_evidence: The added dashlets have the standard SuiteCRM styling, headers, and controls, rather than looking like manually edited HTML.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The internal module names for the Projects and Invoices dashlets are 'Project' and 'AOS_Invoices' respectively. The task configures the Home dashboard for the admin account (user ID 1).
